category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Nebula as an overlay networking tool.
source_facts.description says Scalable overlay networking tool for connecting computers anywhere.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README/project title uses Nebula.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, whose README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/slackhq/nebula, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists nebula and nebula-cert command-line tools.
